name: @gaws-hub/sdk
description: SDK for building and calling gaws-hub agents: the service contract (sync + job services), hub-brokered bus/store, a Hono agent server with a built-in job host, a claude -p runner, a provider-side activity feed, a reusable workbench UI kit, and the versioned contract assets (agents-interface.md, the hub CLI, the compliance checker).

scripts.verify:dist: npm run build && git diff --exit-code dist/
